metadata.title: Critical-minerals supply-response equities — the allied answer to the China rare-earth + antimony chokepoint (MP, PPTA, UAMY, Ucore, and the cohort)
metadata.status: company facts FACT (filings/DoD/EXIM/press); the 'state-anchored vs narrative-beta split' and 'quasi-nationalization' framings are labeled interpretation
metadata.frame: The equity cohort building the allied supply response to China's critical-minerals chokepoint (defense_chokepoint.py: independence infeasible until ~2028). Adds a mineral the corpus had not covered - ANTIMONY (military-critical: ammunition, hardening, IR; ~90% China; Dec-2024 export ban). Same 'narrative-beta split' as macro-quantum-computing / altcoin-lens: a handful of STATE-ANCHORED real builders (DoD equity / price floors / EXIM loans / DPA) vs a long tail that doubles on a stockpile headline. Overlay; excluded from the formal proofs; connects to defense_web, allied_mincut, defense_chokepoint, the globe, and commodities-metals.

the_chokepoint_being_answered.rare_earths: China ~90% of REE processing, ~100% of heavy-REE separation and samarium; Dec-2025 it began auto-denying foreign-military licenses and controls six separated elements (Pr/Nd/Sm/Gd/Tb/Dy). defense_chokepoint.py proves US independence infeasible until ~2028. status: fact.
the_chokepoint_being_answered.antimony: China ~90% of antimony (military-critical: ammunition primers, armor-piercing/hardening, night-vision/IR, flame retardants). China imposed antimony export restrictions on the US in Dec 2024; SUSPENDED Nov 2025 through 27 Nov 2026, but export licensing + the military-end-user ban remain. The price spiked; the US had NO domestic mined antimony. status: fact.
the_chokepoint_being_answered.policy_underwriting: The state is de-risking supply via equity stakes, 10-yr price floors, EXIM loans, DPA Title III, and a Trump $12B critical-minerals strategic stockpile ('Project Vault', announced ~Feb 2026) - a quasi-nationalization of critical-minerals supply. status: fact (instruments) + contested (the 'nationalization' label).

MP_Materials_MP.what: Mountain Pass CA (only scaled US REE mine) + Fort Worth magnet plant. The most de-risked allied REE play.
MP_Materials_MP.state_anchor: DoD became the LARGEST shareholder (Jul 2025): $400M convertible preferred + warrant = ~15%; a 10-YEAR PRICE FLOOR of $110/kg on NdPr; Apple $500M for 100%-recycled magnets (Fort Worth, Mountain Pass feedstock); '10X' second magnet facility (commissioning 2028, ~10kt capacity). status: fact.
MP_Materials_MP.read: state-as-customer + price floor + anchor offtake = the template for underwriting a strategic supply chain the market would not finance alone.

Perpetua_PPTA.what: Stibnite Gold Project, Idaho - the ONLY mined US source of antimony, alongside one of the highest-grade open-pit gold deposits in the US.
Perpetua_PPTA.state_anchor: DoD DPA Title III $59.2M + DOTC awards $22.4M; EXIM Bank approved a $2.9B loan (May 2026) that with cash on hand fully funds direct construction; early-works construction began Oct 2025; Idaho district court denied opponents' injunction 29 May 2026; targeting 2029 operations to deliver antimony to the US military. status: fact.
Perpetua_PPTA.read: gold pays for the mine; antimony is the strategic point. EXIM $2.9B is one of the largest US critical-minerals project loans.

United_States_Antimony_UAMY.what: The only fully-integrated antimony smelter in North America capable of meeting military specs (Thompson Falls, Montana + Mexico ops + Alaska/critical-minerals exploration).
United_States_Antimony_UAMY.state_anchor: ~$350M combined defense + industrial contracts; a Pentagon supply deal (Sep 2025); DoD DPA Title III $27M (Feb 2026); a 6x Montana smelter-capacity expansion targeted to complete Jan 2026. status: fact.
United_States_Antimony_UAMY.read: the antimony refining bottleneck (cf. allied_mincut: the bottleneck is midstream, not mining) - UAMY is the midstream that the Perpetua/imported feed needs.

Ucore_UURAF.what: RapidSX rare-earth SEPARATION technology; Louisiana Strategic Metals Complex (Alexandria).
Ucore_UURAF.state_anchor: DoD $18.4M to bring RapidSX to commercial scale; the SMC separates Pr/Nd/Sm/Gd/Tb/Dy - the six elements under Chinese export controls; full-scale construction + early production targeted H2-2026. status: fact.
Ucore_UURAF.read: directly attacks the SEPARATION chokepoint (the hardest, most China-dominated midstream step) rather than mining.

the_cohort_etc.USA_Rare_Earth_USAR: Round Top TX (heavy REE + gallium/lithium) + a Stillwater OK magnet plant; state-supported. status: fact (developing).
the_cohort_etc.Energy_Fuels_UUUU: White Mesa mill (UT): achieved pilot-scale HEAVY-REE-oxide production; aims commercial by late 2026; also the leading US uranium producer (ties the REE + nuclear-fuel legs). status: fact.
the_cohort_etc.NioCorp_NB: Elk Creek, Nebraska - 2nd-largest US critical-minerals source (niobium/scandium/titanium + REE); ~$1B project seeking EXIM/DoD funding. status: fact (pre-construction).
the_cohort_etc.Idaho_Strategic_IDR: US antimony + gold + REE exploration; surged with the cohort. status: fact (explorer).
the_cohort_etc.Critical_Metals_CRML: Tanbreez (Greenland) REE + Wyoming; pre-revenue ~2028-29; US/EXIM interest (already a globe node). status: fact (pre-revenue).
the_cohort_etc.catalyst: the Trump $12B critical-minerals stockpile ('Project Vault', ~Feb 2026) pumped the whole cohort: Critical Metals +241%, NioCorp/Energy Fuels/Idaho Strategic +100%+ over three months. status: fact (the moves) - the narrative-beta tail.

the_narrative_beta_split: Same pattern as macro-quantum-computing and altcoin-lens: separate the STATE-ANCHORED real builders (MP - DoD largest shareholder + price floor; Perpetua - EXIM $2.9B + 2029 antimony; UAMY - only NA mil-spec smelter + DPA; Ucore - DoD-funded separation) from the NARRATIVE-BETA tail that doubles on a stockpile headline and halves as fast. The state anchor (equity, price floor, offtake, EXIM, DPA, stockpile) is what distinguishes a strategic supply chain from a momentum trade - the 'state-as-customer' de-risking also seen in Centrus (HALEU) and IonQ (quantum).
why_it_matters_to_the_map: (1) Adds ANTIMONY as a second China critical-minerals chokepoint beyond REE - same auto-deny/military-end-user logic, same ~2028-29 independence timeline the defense_chokepoint Z3 proves. (2) The supply response is REAL but SLOW: every builder targets 2026-2029, exactly the window the proof says independence is infeasible - these equities ARE that timeline materializing or slipping. (3) The state is underwriting it (equity/price-floors/EXIM/DPA/stockpile) - a quasi-nationalization that is the mirror image of the AI-capex private circular financing: here the GOVERNMENT is the circular funder of last resort for the physical chokepoint the AI build cannot buy past.
